content.full_text:
December 28, 2000

County of San Diego
Registrar of Voters
Attn: Elvira
5201 Ruffin Road, Suite I
San Diego, California 92123-1693

Re: Your Request for Advice
Our File No. W-00-246

Dear Elvira:

This letter is to memorialize the withdrawal of your October 23, 2000, request for written advice to the Fair Political Practices Commission regarding the Pine Valley Fire District mailer on Proposition CC.

Your request for written advice was rescinded on December 20, 2000. Please contact the Commission at (916) 322-5660 should you have any additional questions or comments.

Very truly yours,

Hyla Wagner
Staff Counsel, Legal Division
